text: Our technique we use three port incisions.

and then we grab both ends of the suture out through the third port we use a sliding knot with knot butcher and then we tie down to the doctor tissue under controlling the blood pressure lower than 80 millimeters mercury and then we use a clip in order to prevent the knot losing
